senses.gloss: close friend (especially at school), associate, companion
patient companion (a family member or an acquaintance who accompanies a patient to a hospital)
accompanying, adjoint, associated, attendant (adjective), concomitant, concurrent

etymology.text:
Derived from the active participle of رَافَقَ (rāfaqa, “to accompany”).

See the etymology of the corresponding lemma form.
